caption: A sequence of educational presentation slides focuses on the "Linde – Hampson System" within the subject of "CRYOGENIC ENGINEERING". The slides feature a white background with a blue header and footer. The footer identifies the presenter as "Prof. M D Atrey, Department of Mechanical Engineering, IIT Bombay" and includes the "NPTEL" logo in the bottom left corner. The content begins with two mathematical formulas: "y = (h_1 - h_2) / (h_1 - h)" and "h_{1'} = \varepsilon(h_1 - h_g) + h_g". As the sequence progresses, a bullet point appears stating, "From the above two equations, substituting one into another, we have y as". Red rectangular boxes then appear around specific variables in the formulas, specifically highlighting "h_1" in the numerator of the first equation and "h_{1'}" at the beginning of the second equation, indicating a focus on these terms for the upcoming substitution.
